title: Senior Teacher - Don Bosco Tech - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Don Bosco Tech - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Don Bosco Tech family as a Senior Teacher in Bhubaneswar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Don Bosco Tech:
Don Bosco Tech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Don Bosco Tech!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
